narrative:
Saltlick Township has 666 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
